name: Intuitive Machines, Inc.
business: Intuitive Machines is a space infrastructure and services company that builds spacecraft, connects space-based networks, and operates infrastructure for civil, national security, and commercial markets. The company's strategy is to evolve space activity from single-mission execution toward continuously operating infrastructure by combining spacecraft delivery with network connectivity and long-term operations.
sellsTo: U.S. Government (NASA, national security space, Department of Defense)

exposures.sentence: We build spacecraft, connect space-based networks, and operate infrastructure as-a-service that support operations across low Earth orbit (LEO), geostationary orbit (GEO), cislunar space, and deep-space.

We believe the United States is transitioning from episodic space missions to long-duration operations and persistent presence, and we are building the systems and services required to support this evolution across civil, national security, and commercial markets.

We design, build, integrate and operate spacecraft, communications networks, and space systems that support operations across low Earth orbit (LEO), geostationary orbit (GEO), cislunar space, and deep space.
Intuitive Machines is developing its Lunar Terrain Vehicle for NASA through its global partnership team including, AVL, Boeing, CSIRO, Fugro, Michelin, Northrop Grumman, and Roush.
We may use artificial intelligence (AI) in our business or systems, and challenges with properly managing its use could result in competitive and reputational harm.

catalysts.sentence: The initial NASA payload contract for the IM-1 mission was awarded in June 2019 and was completed in February 2024.
The IM-2 mission was completed in March 2025.

catalysts.event: IM-4 mission launch expected second half of 2027
catalysts.sentence: The initial NASA payload contract for the IM-4 mission was awarded in August 2024 with an initial targeted mission launch date no later than August 2028, although we expect the mission launch to occur during the second half of 2027.
On October 1, 2025, we completed the stock purchase agreement to acquire 100% of the issued and outstanding capital stock of KinetX, Inc.
On January 13, 2026, the Company completed the acquisition of 100% of the issued and outstanding membership interests of Lanteris.
On August 18, 2025, the Company issued $345.0 million aggregate principal amount of 2.500% convertible senior notes due 2030.
Warrants remaining unexercised as of March 6, 2025 (the Redemption Date) were redeemed by the Company for $0.01 per Warrant.

On February 27, 2026, the Company completed the Securities Purchase Agreement with the Investors relating to the issuance and sale to the Investors of shares of Class A Common Stock at a price of $15.12 per share for an aggregate purchase price of $175.0 million.

On March 4, 2025, the Company entered into a loan and security agreement with Stifel Bank which provides for a secured revolving credit facility in an aggregate principal amount of up to $40.0 million.
